# Jason Plank — jasonplank.com

## About
Jason Plank is a Digital Marketing Strategist based in Memphis, TN with over 20 years of experience leading high-impact online initiatives. He currently works at Baker Donelson, one of the nation's largest law firms, where he manages the firm's digital presence across multiple platforms.

## Professional Focus
- Digital marketing strategy and execution
- SEO, data analytics, and content strategy
- Email marketing program development
- Social media strategy and training
- Podcast production ("Everybody Leads" podcast)
- AI integration in legal marketing workflows
- Website development and optimization

## Current Role
Digital Marketing Strategist at Baker Donelson (July 2016 – Present, Memphis, TN)
- Plans, develops, and evaluates digital strategy across online platforms
- Executes outbound marketing programs driving revenue and lead generation
- Maintains the firm's public website and coordinates social media presence
- Trains attorneys and staff on social media best practices
- Produces podcasts and monitors key metrics for digital effectiveness

## Previous Role
Internet Content Director at WMC-TV / Action News 5 (July 2003 – December 2011, Memphis, TN)
- Managed content and layout of a local television news website
- Implemented social media strategies and campaigns
- Managed the rollout of a 17-community local news website network

## Education
Otterbein University — B.A. Communication and Media Studies

## Awards
- LMA Southeast Winner — Website, Total Overhaul (September 2017)
- Mid-South Emmy Nominee — Interactivity, 25th Annual Mid-South Emmy Awards (January 2011)

## Notable Projects
- "Everybody Leads" Podcast: Produced the leadership podcast for Baker Donelson's Chairman & CEO
- Baker Donelson Website Overhaul: Led award-winning total overhaul of the firm's public website
- AI-Powered Legal Marketing: Integrating AI tools (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT) into legal marketing workflows
- 17-Community News Network: Built a network of community-focused local news websites at WMC-TV
- Reds Game Center: Hardware project — ESP32-based MLB scoreboard focused on the Cincinnati Reds, with TFT display and MLB Stats API
- Plank Family Meal-o-Matic: Full-stack web app using Google Cloud Run, Firestore, Gemini AI, and Kroger API for automated meal planning
